summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Wed Us CRM application including backend APIs, frontend UI, and integration testing. Backend APIs are fully functional with 15/15 tests passing. Frontend UI is working well with successful login, All Leads Table functionality, filters, sorting, pagination, and call log features.

ui_bugs.issue: User sessions expire frequently during testing, requiring re-login

passed_tests: Call log response addition via POST /api/leads/{id}/response
All Leads Table page loading and navigation
Filter dropdowns (Category, Priority, Assigned To, City, Portfolio, Duplicates)
Pagination controls and row count selection
Call log buttons with call count display
Lead data display (company names, phone, city, category, etc.)
Call log panel opening and closing
Company name links navigation to Lead Overview
Lead Overview page structure and elements
action_item_for_main_agent: Session timeout issue needs to be addressed - consider increasing JWT token expiration time or implementing automatic token refresh to improve user experience during extended usage.

success_percentage.frontend: 90% (most features working, minor session timeout issue)
